dialogue: Hey guys, does anybody know a good date place in the neighborhood?

Sure, just lend me your breasts and we’ll be on our way.

So, I don’t know if he’s testing me or just acting out, but my monkey is out of control! He keeps erasing the messages on my machine!
And a few days ago, he got to the newspaper before I did and peed all over the crossword!
And last night, I don’t know what he did, but there were capers everywhere!
My dad wanted to know if you wanted to play racquetball with us.
Yeah, and he didn’t really ask for you. He asked for Chancy, I assumed he meant you.
No. I thought it would be more fun this way.

You can see the moonlight bouncing off her head!

I’m the holiday armadillo!
